display.purpose: Page titles and modal headers, used once per view.

body.purpose: Primary reading size for content, max 75ch.

label.purpose: Form labels, button text, tab labels.

mono.purpose: Code snippets, deploy URLs, release hashes.

shadows.name: sm
shadows.purpose: Subtle hover lift for interactive elements.

shadows.name: md
shadows.purpose: Dropdown menus and small elevated panels.

motion.name: fast
motion.purpose: Quick state transitions (hover, focus, border shifts).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action button. Charcoal background, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 20px; font-family: Inter4CJK, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #ffffff; background: #1a1a1a; border: 1px solid #1a1a1a; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms ease; white-space: nowrap; user-select: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #333333; border-color: #333333; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #000000; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action button. Outlined with border.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 20px; font-family: Inter4CJK, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #1a1a1a; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms ease; white-space: nowrap; user-select: none; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f5f5f5; border-color: #c0c0c0; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-emphasis action, used for icon buttons inline.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; font-family: Inter4CJK, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #6b6b6b; background: transparent; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms ease; white-space: nowrap; user-select: none; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f5f5f5; color: #1a1a1a; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text input with label and optional icon.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-label { font-family: Inter4CJK, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #1a1a1a; } .ds-field { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; } .ds-icon { position: absolute; left: 12px; color: #9a9a9a; pointer-events: none; } .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 40px; padding: 0 12px; padding-left: 36px; font-family: Inter4CJK, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #1a1a1a; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 6px; transition: border-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9a9a9a; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #1a1a1a; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #1a1a1a; outline: none; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container with optional header. No shadow at rest.
components.html:
Projects
3 total
Project A
Project B
Project C
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Inter4CJK, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 20px 20px 0; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1a1a; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 13px; color: #6b6b6b; margin-top: 4px; } .ds-card-body { padding: 20px; }

components.name: Dialog
components.description: Modal dialog with overlay, header, and scrollable body.
components.html:
Settings

Dialog content goes here.
components.css: .ds-dialog-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); padding: 16px; z-index: 100; } .ds-dialog { display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.10); max-height: 85vh; overflow: hidden; min-width: 420px; font-family: Inter4CJK, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; } .ds-dialog-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 20px 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .ds-dialog-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-dialog-close { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 6px; color: #9a9a9a; cursor: pointer; border: none; background: none; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-dialog-close:hover { background: #f5f5f5; color: #1a1a1a; } .ds-dialog-body { overflow-y: auto; padding: 24px; }

components.name: Badge Outline
components.css: .ds-badge-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: Inter4CJK, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: #6b6b6b; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 999px; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Badge Success
components.css: .ds-badge-success { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: Inter4CJK, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: #2e7d32; background: #f0fdf0; border-radius: 999px; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Navigation Sidebar
components.description: Left sidebar with project list and user menu.
components.html:
ZipShip
JD
John Doe
john@example.com
components.css: .ds-sidebar { width: 260px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; border-right: 1px solid #e8e8e8; background: #ffffff; font-family: Inter4CJK, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; } .ds-sidebar-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 20px 20px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .ds-sidebar-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-sidebar-content { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-sidebar-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; width: 100%; padding: 12px; font-size: 13px; color: #1a1a1a; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; border: none; background: none; text-align: left; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-sidebar-item:hover { background: #f5f5f5; } .ds-sidebar-item-active { background: #f0f0f0; font-weight: 500; } .ds-sidebar-footer { padding: 16px; border-top: 1px solid #e8e8e8; } .ds-sidebar-user { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; width: 100%; padding: 12px; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-sidebar-user:hover { background: #f5f5f5; } .ds-avatar { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; background: #f0f0f0; color: #6b6b6b; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; user-select: none; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Toast Notification
components.description: Temporary notification, slides in from right.
components.html:
Published successfully
Version a8f32c91 is now live
components.css: .ds-toast { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; padding: 16px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-left: 3px solid #2e7d32; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); pointer-events: auto; min-width: 300px; max-width: 380px; font-family: Inter4CJK, Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; } .ds-toast-body { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-toast-title { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #1a1a1a; } .ds-toast-msg { font-size: 12px; color: #6b6b6b; margin-top: 2px; } .ds-toast-close { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 4px; color: #9a9a9a; cursor: pointer; border: none; background: none; flex-shrink: 0; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-toast-close:hover { background: #f5f5f5; color: #1a1a1a; }

narrative.overview:
ZipShip's console is a clean, purposeful workspace for deploying static sites — a pilot's console, not a manager's dashboard. Every surface is restrained by default: warm off-whites, charcoal accents, crisp borders. The system communicates through typographic weight and spatial rhythm, not decorative color.

This is a restrained palette with one committed accent: near-black charcoal. The accent's job is to mark interactive truth — a button, an active tab, a focused input — not to decorate. Color is semantic, not ornamental.

The console explicitly rejects the visual language of AI tools (no blue or purple accents, no gradient text, no glassmorphism), the density of enterprise backends (no packed data tables, no heavy card grids), and the clichés of SaaS templates (no hero-metric sections, no numbered section markers, no tiny uppercase eyebrow over every heading).
keyCharacteristics: Charcoal anchor. The single accent is near-black (#1a1a1a). No hue, no gradient, no blue.
Warm neutral canvas. Off-white backgrounds with subtle tonal separation, not cold gray.
Type-driven hierarchy. Scale + weight do the layout work; color accents are rare.
Flat-by-default. Surfaces sit flat at rest. Shadows appear only for state changes and modal elevation.
Generous but precise spacing. An 8px baseline grid with deliberate breathing room between sections.
Day and night as equals. Both themes are first-class citizens, built from the same token system.

rules.name: The Charcoal Accent Rule
rules.body: The accent is never blue, purple, teal, or gradient. It is always a near-black neutral. This single constraint prevents the system from drifting into 'AI tool' or 'enterprise portal' territory.

rules.name: The One-Color Rule
rules.body: Any given screen uses at most two colors from the palette: a neutral background tone + the charcoal accent. Semantic colors (red, green) appear only in badges and toasts. If a screen needs a third color, the design is wrong — simplify.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: Inter4CJK handles everything — Latin, CJK, display, body, labels, mono. No secondary display face, no serif accent, no brand typeface outside the app shell. A single loaded family eliminates FOUT, keeps the bundle lean, and guarantees visual cohesion across all 6 font sizes and 4 weights.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No surface has a shadow at rest. If it's not interactive and not an overlay, it doesn't float. A card with a 1px border and no shadow reads as a container; a card with a shadow reads as 'pick me up.' The second interpretation is almost never what the UI intends.

dos: Do use charcoal (#1a1a1a) as the single accent color across buttons, tabs, focus rings, and links. Consistency builds trust.
Do let typography do the hierarchy work — weight and size establish what's important, not color.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest. A 1px border + tonal background separation is enough depth.
Do use the full spacing scale deliberately. 24px between sections, 16px between related items, 8px between label and input.
Do use semantic colors (red, green) only for their named purpose — never as decoration.
Do treat day and night themes as equals. Both are designed from the same tokens, not one adapted from the other.
donts: Don't use blue, dark blue, blue-purple, or teal anywhere in the UI. This is a hard constraint — the system rejects the 'AI tool' color family entirely.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient). Emphasis comes from weight and size, not color transitions.
Don't use glassmorphism (backdrop blur + semi-transparency) as a default surface treatment.
Don't use side-stripe borders (colored border-left > 1px on cards or list items). Use full borders, background tints, or nothing.
Don't over-round corners. Cards max out at 8px, dialogs at 12px, buttons at 6px. The 24px+ rounded card is an anti-pattern.
Don't pair border: 1px solid with box-shadow blur ≥ 16px on the same element. Pick one — border OR shadow, never both as decoration.
Don't create identical card grids (same-sized cards with icon + heading + text repeated across a section).
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, gradient accent) — it reads as SaaS-template, not precision tool.
Don't put a tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section heading. One deliberate kicker is voice; repeating it on every section is AI grammar.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as default scaffolding.
